variants: Cristal Gutierrez was born in Forestgate Fields and has made her home in the scenic Copperbee Range. A gifted inventor, she created the Blossom Forge Engine, a revolutionary device praised within her community. Her expertise in metallurgy earned her a spot in the esteemed Emberwing Metallurgists Guild, where she shares her passion for the craft. Additionally, she has been honored with the Greythorn Crest, a recognition that highlights her contributions to the field of metallurgic engineering. Cristal continues to inspire others with her innovative approach and dedication.

Residing in the Copperbee Range, Cristal Gutierrez originally hails from Forestgate Fields. She is celebrated for her invention known as the Blossom Forge Engine, which has transformed local metallurgical practices. As a member of the Emberwing Metallurgists Guild, Cristal actively engages with fellow enthusiasts and professionals. Her commendable work has not gone unnoticed; she has received the prestigious Greythorn Crest for her contributions to the industry. Cristal's journey reflects her commitment to both her craft and community.
